name: Mecha Chameleon
tagline: Stealth action with a shape-shifting robot lizard
shortDesc: Play as a shape-shifting mech lizard in this stealth-action adventure by Shakila developer.
longDescription:
Mecha Chameleon is a stealth-action game where you play as a shape-shifting robotic lizard on a mission to infiltrate enemy bases. Blend into your surroundings, take down guards, and uncover a story of rebellion and identity.

What is Mecha Chameleon?

Mecha Chameleon combines classic stealth gameplay with a unique shape-shifting mechanic. Your character can mimic the colour and texture of nearby surfaces to become nearly invisible. Sneak past patrols, hack terminals, and choose between lethal and non-lethal takedowns.

Features

  • Shape-shift to blend into any environment
  • Multiple missions across varied maps
  • Tactical combat with stealth and brute-force options
  • Upgradeable mech abilities and gadgets
  • Story-driven campaign mode

About the Developer

Mecha Chameleon is developed by Shakila, an indie developer based in India, with over 100,000 downloads on Google Play.

faq.a: Yes, Mecha Chameleon is free to download and play on Google Play.
Yes, the campaign can be played completely offline once installed.

faq.q: What age rating is Mecha Chameleon?
faq.a: Mecha Chameleon is rated for ages 12+ due to mild fantasy violence.
Mecha Chameleon is developed by Shakila, an indie studio based in India.
